summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Yrvante Lead Finder v3. All 7 new backend tests passed (100%). All v3 frontend flows verified: search with leads, Opslaan, Laad meer button, CSV export, Deel Rapport (share URL shown), KVK/FB/IG links, Mijn Leads tab with status update, Dashboard with Google Sheets 'Verbind met Google Sheets' button.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/share accepts 'titel' as query param not body - this is an inconsistency (minor, works fine)
search_history totaal reflects total found (including with-website), not just leads without website - this is cosmetic but may confuse dashboard users
Dashboard 'recente zoekopdrachten' shows duplicate entries for same branche/stad (e.g. 'loodgieter — Utrecht' twice) - no deduplication logic
seed_data_creation: 2 leads saved during testing: 'Installatiebedrijf Frans Hoek' and 'Loodgieter Express' (loodgieter/Almelo). Share reports created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v3 features all verified: pagination (next_page_token in response, Laad meer button works when >20 results), share report (POST /api/share returns token+url, GET /api/share/{token} works, frontend shows share URL on click), Google Sheets configured=true (client_id set), sheets/login returns Google OAuth auth_url, Dashboard tab shows 'Verbind met Google Sheets' button. Use 'loodgieter Almelo' search for reliable lead results (businesses without websites).
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All v3 endpoints and UI flows working correctly.
